title: Windows 95 Inventory
description: A windows 95 themed Inventory (don't tell anyone but i used lots of 98 assets)
body:
Have you ever wanted a more custom Inventory experience? well this resource pack tries to create that by emulating inaccurately the Windows 95 look. Everything from an animated clippy recipe book companion to having a windows tab represent your hotbar in all interfaces this pack will provide you with an all encompassing windows themed look for everything inventory.

![lil' preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbd7b33fc2f944cddac7b8987b8d4500bee04ba8.png)

_note that below 1.21.4 certain elements such as your empty armour icons will still be visible_


_for best experience on smaller screens change GUI scale in video settings to 3x to avoid unstraight lines_
